name: save_release
description: Create or update a release. If `id` is provided, updates the existing release; otherwise creates a new one. When creating, `name` and `pipeline` are required. Release status is modeled as the release pipeline stage.

id.description: Release ID or slug to update. Omit to create a new release.

pipeline.description: Release pipeline ID, slug, or exact name (required when creating)

stage.description: Release stage ID, exact name, or lifecycle type within the release pipeline

startDate.description: Estimated start date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, null to remove)

targetDate.description: Estimated completion date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, null to remove)

startedAt.description: Started timestamp (ISO DateTime, null to remove)

completedAt.description: Completed timestamp (ISO DateTime, null to remove)

commitSha.description: Commit SHA associated with the release
